situation: audit-2026-07-06-021 M-003 finding: storage.py:88 hash()-based IDs are predictable and collision-prone. Investigation revealed 5 identical call sites (line 94/190/225/260/392) all using abs(hash(...))%10**12 for ID generation. Python hash() is randomized per-process via PYTHONHASHSEED (default since 3.3), causing same input to produce different IDs across restarts → INSERT OR REPLACE fails to deduplicate, creating duplicate rows + irreproducible IDs across processes.
action: Replace all 5 hash()-based ID generators with deterministic _det_id() helper wrapping hashlib.sha256 truncated to 12 hex chars (48-bit collision space). Added import hashlib + _det_id(prefix, *parts) function. Replaced: add_memory (m-), add_intervention (iv-), add_event (ev-), add_reminder (rm-), add_wiki_page (wiki-). Verified determinism: same input always yields same ID; different inputs yield different IDs. Syntax check passed.
outcome_evidence: commit f68d9ba on auto/opt-storage-1782988687, pushed origin (forced update after rebase onto origin/main). cp-guard triggered (worktree had prior unmerged M-004/L-005 changes) → case-104 escape hatch: edited directly in worktree + committed within worktree. python3 -c verification confirmed _det_id deterministic + syntax OK.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: M-004 config.py:17 .env parser mishandles values with '=' and mixed quoting. After that: M-005 relay_bridge.py:107 Origin validation bypassed when Origin header absent.

audit_findings.finding: hash()-based ID generation is non-deterministic across process restarts due to PYTHONHASHSEED randomization. Same memory/event/reminder/intervention/wiki content produces different IDs on each run, defeating INSERT OR REPLACE deduplication and causing duplicate rows.
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with hashlib.sha256-based deterministic ID generator (_det_id helper). Truncate to 12 hex chars (48-bit) for MVP-scale collision safety.

audit_findings.finding: Same hash()-based ID issue in add_intervention()
Same hash()-based ID issue in add_event()
Same hash()-based ID issue in add_reminder()
Same hash()-based ID issue in add_wiki_page()
